control_awareness: Control P2P-C-001 enforces department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Control P2P-C-002 prevents requester from self-approving. Control P2P-C-003 requires approval before PO issuance.
expected_control_effect: The system will route the request for department head approval before purchase order creation.
overall_reason: Given the lack of timing pressure and the preference for a straightforward, auditable plan, creating a single consolidated purchase request for the full amount with a normal approval route is appropriate, meeting all internal control requirements.
reason: The purchase need amount (1,750,000) exceeds the manager approval threshold, requiring department head level approval. Creating a single purchase request aligns with the preference for a clear consolidated request and follows standard approval timing since there is no quarter-end pressure.
